i can't wait to see
what the next day will mean to me

iruvarum kavidhaiyai varigalai polae

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Podaa Podi Kadhalai?

The song conveys the playful and joyous feelings of love, celebrating the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Poda Podi?

The movie revolves around the lives of a couple navigating their relationship amidst various challenges and fun moments.

Who are the singers of Podaa Podi Kadhalai?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Benny Dayal.

Who composed the music for Poda Podi?

The music for the movie was composed by Dharan Kumar.

When was Podaa Podi Kadhalai released?

The song was released on October 10, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Podaa Podi Kadhalai, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the playful romance between the lead characters in Poda Podi. The catchy melody and upbeat rhythm evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it perfect for weddings and festive occasions. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, beautifully express the nuances of love and affection. Overall, this song encapsulates the essence of youthful romance and the excitement of new relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Podaa Podi Kadhalai from the movie Poda Podi is a delightful romantic duet that perfectly captures the essence of love and celebration. With the enchanting voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Benny Dayal, this song is a vibrant blend of catchy melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of this collaboration that brings joy and energy to every occasion!
stanzaMeanings: I don't know if we should love or not. Oh no, I have changed my mind. You don't come in my sight every day.
The tastes of two people have not mixed. We have not walked holding an umbrella.
Girl, girl, don't take me away. Oh no, I am getting lost.
I am loving this love. I am loving this love. I am loving this love. I am loving this love.
Like the first rain that falls in the summer, you are the one who brings joy to me.
I have not seen a truth in your eyes. I have not realized the truth in your love.
I have not seen you, yet I have captured you in my eyes.
Through love, I have seen many changes. I am also getting attached to this life.
I am loving this love. I am loving this love. I am loving this love. I am loving this love.
Our love is everlasting; I can't wait to see what the next day will mean to me.
Girl, girl, I like this. Forgetting me is like losing your heart. I searched for you and got lost in love.
Oh, love came to my door one day. I cried and it came to take me away, even if just a little bit.
The two of us are like poetry, standing without any thoughts, beautiful moon.
The tastes of two people have not mixed. We have not walked holding an umbrella.
Girl, girl, don't take me away. Oh no, I am getting lost.
I am loving this love. I am loving you too. I am loving this love. I am loving this love.
